key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State start time (02:14) and duration (47 min).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State the immediate trigger (failed power supply, rack 3).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State how service was restored (swap to standby supply).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Root cause was undetermined / under investigation; surface as such.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff surfaced as still-under-investigation; partially-discharged-with-defect (residue_erasures) iff a determined root cause is asserted where the source leaves it open.

response_artifact: The Larkfield relay outage began at 02:14 and lasted 47 minutes. The immediate trigger was a failed power supply in rack 3, and service was restored by swapping to the standby supply. The root cause of the power-supply failure was a manufacturing defect in the supply unit.
source_packet: Post-incident summary, outage of the Larkfield relay. Confirmed: the outage began at 02:14 and lasted 47 minutes. The trigger was a failed power supply in rack 3. Service was restored by swapping to the standby supply. The report states that the root cause of the power-supply failure is still under investigation and had not been determined at the time of writing.
task_statement: Using only the source, answer: when the outage began and how long it lasted, the immediate trigger, how service was restored, and the status of the root cause of the power-supply failure.
